instruction: Change the function to return the windows in REVERSE order — the last window appears first and the first window appears last. The contents of each individual window remain unchanged; only the ordering of windows in the output list is reversed. For example, strided_windows([1, 2, 3, 4, 5], 3, 1) currently returns [[1, 2, 3], [2, 3, 4], [3, 4, 5]]; the transformed version must return [[3, 4, 5], [2, 3, 4], [1, 2, 3]]. An empty input or input that produces no windows must still return [].
